props.message:
SENTINEL HALL

The quiet wardens stand here. They were set in stone before any Wyrdkin came north. They have not moved.

They are not asleep.

A small carved line at the base of the floor:

'Speak the right thing and the watch will answer. Speak the wrong thing and the watch will not.'

root.speaker: The Sentinel
root.text: *the Sentinel does not turn. The eyes are open. The eyes do not blink.*

no_answer.speaker: The Sentinel
no_answer.text: *no answer. The light on its shoulder does not flicker.*

answer.speaker: The Sentinel
answer.text:
*the head turns. Slow. The voice is older than stone-cutting.*

Walker. The watch is kept. The realm endures.

Go well. Go quietly. The next door north is the Crown.

leave.speaker: The Sentinel
leave.text: *the Sentinel is again as it was.*
